title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 640.013 - Appeals from certain environmental decisions to be heard by administrative hearing commission
text:
640.013.  Appeals from certain environmental decisions to be heard by administrative hearing commission. — The administrative hearing commission shall have the authority to hear certain environmental appeals in accordance with section 621.250.
(L. 2005 H.B. 824, A.L. 2008 H.B. 1469)
